extPrompt.title: Install the JPassbolt browser extension
extPrompt.descLogin: The web app is fully featured and you can sign in directly; installing the extension adds cross-site autofill and stronger key isolation (optional).
extPrompt.descRecovery: You can complete recovery right in the web app; installing the extension adds cross-site autofill and stronger key isolation (optional).
extPrompt.descSetup: You can complete setup right in the web app; installing the extension adds cross-site autofill and stronger key isolation (optional).

login.title: Sign in to your end-to-end encrypted vault
login.subtitle: Authenticate with a zero-knowledge challenge-response using your OpenPGP private key. The key never leaves this browser.
login.note: Your private key and passphrase are used locally only and are never uploaded to the server

errors.missingKey: Please paste your GPG private key.
errors.loginFailed: Sign-in failed. Please check your private key and passphrase.
errors.unlockFailed: Unlock failed. Please sign in again.
errors.mfaCancelled: Two-factor verification cancelled. You can sign in again.

request.title: Recover your account
request.subtitle: Lost your device or forgot how to sign in? Verify your identity, then regain vault access using your saved key backup.
request.noteNoExpose: Recovery never exposes your private key or passphrase
request.sentDesc: If that email matches an account, we've sent a message with a recovery link.
request.sentHint: Open the recovery link from the email to continue (the link contains a one-time recovery token).
request.noteNoExposeOld: Recovery never exposes your old private key or passphrase

verify.title: Verify your identity
verify.subtitlePrefix: Import the key backup you previously exported and enter its passphrase. The server will confirm the key belongs to
verify.methodBackupDesc: Upload the passphrase-protected private key backup (.asc) you exported earlier.
verify.methodCodeDesc: Use the one-time recovery code saved at registration (not supported in this version).
verify.methodAdminDesc: Have an organization administrator approve rebuilding your access (not supported in this version).
verify.pasteLabel: Paste or choose your .asc key backup

reset.title: Confirm and restore access
reset.subtitle: Your key backup has been unlocked locally with your passphrase. After you submit, the server will verify the fingerprint matches and restore your access.
reset.warning: The server only accepts a key whose fingerprint matches the existing key on file for this account; otherwise it is rejected.

done.title: Account recovered
done.subtitle: Your key has been re-verified and you've regained access to your vault.
done.note: Your private key and passphrase never left this device

errors.sendFailed: Could not send the recovery email. Please try again later or contact your administrator.
errors.linkInvalid: The recovery link is invalid or has expired. Please start account recovery again.
errors.missingBackup: Please paste the OpenPGP private key backup (.asc) you exported earlier.
errors.keyNotProtected: This private key is not passphrase-protected. For security, JPassbolt requires a passphrase-protected private key.
errors.unlockFailed: Could not unlock the imported private key with that passphrase. Please check your key backup and passphrase.
errors.recoverFailed: Account recovery failed. Please confirm the key belongs to this account and try again.

invite.title: You've been invited to JPassbolt
invite.subtitle: Once you accept, your end-to-end encryption key pair will be generated on this device. The private key never leaves this browser.
invite.note: After you accept, your key pair will be generated on this device

key.title: Create your encryption identity
key.subtitle: Your private key only ever exists on this device; the server stores only the public key.
key.genDesc: Create a brand-new OpenPGP key (RSA-3072) on this device in just a few seconds.
key.importDesc: Already have a passphrase-protected OpenPGP private key? Paste the .asc contents to keep using it.
key.pasteLabel: Paste or choose your .asc private key

passphrase.title: Set a passphrase
passphrase.subtitle: Used to unlock your private key on this device. It never leaves the device and cannot be recovered.
passphrase.label: Passphrase
passphrase.reqMixed: Mix of upper- and lowercase letters and digits
passphrase.warning: JPassbolt cannot reset your passphrase. Be sure to remember it, or save the recovery kit in the next step.

done.title: Your identity is ready
done.subtitle: Your key has been generated and encrypted locally. Click to enter the vault and activate your account.
done.kitDesc: Use it to regain access if you lose your device · keep it offline
done.note: Your private key and passphrase never left this device

errors.missingLink: Invalid link: missing user_id or token. Please use the complete invitation link from your email.
errors.inviteInvalid: The invitation link is invalid or has expired. Please ask your administrator to re-invite you.
errors.genFailed: Key generation failed. Please try again.
errors.missingKey: Please paste your OpenPGP private key (.asc) first.
errors.keyNotProtected: This private key is not passphrase-protected. For security, JPassbolt requires a passphrase-protected private key.
errors.unlockFailed: Could not unlock the imported private key with that passphrase. Please check your key and passphrase.
errors.activateFailed: Activation failed. Please try again or contact your administrator.
